market_read: Hardware scarcity remains supported, but platform demand confirmation is weakening.

data_health.message: Data retrieval OK. 34 of 34 tickers retrieved. Core tickers available.

interpretation.plain_english: The market may be entering a more fragile late-cycle setup: hardware bottleneck stocks remain strong, but platform demand confirmation is weakening and stress is rising.
why: Bottleneck Score is high, meaning hardware scarcity is still being rewarded.
Demand Score is weak/neutral, indicating platform ROI confirmation is lagging.
Stress is rising/high, showing strain in high-beta AI infrastructure or credit proxies.
watch_next: If Demand falls further, the divergence between hardware providers and their customers widens dangerously.
If Stress continues to spike, the market may transition from a 'squeeze' into outright CAPEX Bubble Fear (D).
interpretation.investor_reading: Hardware names may still look strong, but risk is rising because customer-side ROI confirmation is less clear. This environment typically warrants caution and a preference for quality over highly levered beta.

divergence_warnings.message: ASIC/networking rotation is very strong versus NVDA. Market may be shifting to custom silicon/scale-out.
Hardware bottleneck stocks remain strong while stress is rising. This can resemble a late-cycle squeeze.
Bottleneck strength is narrow. Fewer AI-chain stocks are confirming the move.
